summary: Auto Room Mapping Wizard feature testing complete. All 3 backend API endpoints (17/17 tests passed) and frontend wizard UI working correctly. 4-step wizard flow (Kanal Secimi -> Oda Eslestirme -> Fiyat Plani -> Onay & Kayit) fully functional with fuzzy matching suggestions and confidence scores.
features_tested: Backend: Fuzzy name matching with confidence scores (difflib.SequenceMatcher) - PASSED
Backend: Turkish/English alias boosting (standard/standart, family/aile, etc.) - PASSED
Backend: No duplicate external entity assignments in suggestions - PASSED
Backend: Authentication required for all endpoints - PASSED
Frontend: Room Mapping Wizard page loads at /room-mapping-wizard - PASSED
Frontend: 4-step wizard stepper (Kanal Secimi -> Oda Eslestirme -> Fiyat Plani -> Onay & Kayit) - PASSED
Frontend: Connector selection dropdown shows all connectors with provider/status badges - PASSED
Frontend: Room suggestions display with confidence badges (100%, 96%, 92%, 76%, 62%) - PASSED
Frontend: Rate plan suggestions display with confidence badges - PASSED
Frontend: Summary badges show auto/review/unmatched counts - PASSED
Frontend: Existing mappings shown separately (Mevcut Eslestirmeler) - PASSED
Frontend: Step 4 shows summary of all selected mappings - PASSED
Frontend: 'Onayla ve Kaydet' button enabled when mappings selected - PASSED
Nav: 'Oda Eslestirme Sihirbazi' appears under Kanallar menu - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: auto_mapping_service.py: Well-implemented fuzzy matching using difflib.SequenceMatcher with Turkish/English alias boosting
auto_mapping_service.py: Greedy optimal matching algorithm prevents duplicate external entity assignments
auto_mapping_service.py: Proper fallback from property_id to tenant_id-only queries for PMS rooms
mapping_wizard_router.py: Clean 3-endpoint structure with proper Pydantic models for request validation
RoomMappingWizard.jsx: Good use of data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
RoomMappingWizard.jsx: Proper state management for multi-step wizard flow
navItems.jsx: Correctly placed under 'channels' navGroup with moduleKey='channel_manager'
seed_data_creation: Test mappings created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto Room Mapping Wizard fully functional. Uses fuzzy matching (difflib.SequenceMatcher) with Turkish/English alias boosting for auto-suggestions. Test connector ID: 27cc2aa6-68c8-4f62-95e0-076ef2c2f634 has seeded external room types and rate plans. Wizard accessible via /room-mapping-wizard or Kanallar menu -> 'Oda Eslestirme Sihirbazi'. Login uses 'access_token' key. Auth page uses data-testid='hotel-login-email' for email input.

frontend_tests.step1_connector_selection: WORKING - Dropdown shows connectors with provider/status badges
frontend_tests.step2_room_suggestions: WORKING - Shows suggestions with confidence scores (100%, 96%, 92%, 76%, 62%)
frontend_tests.step3_rate_suggestions: WORKING - Shows rate plan suggestions with confidence scores
